entities.boy: a boy staring at the chess board

scenes.title: The Chess Game
scenes.background_prompt: A quiet room with a wooden chess table, two chairs, a clock on the wall, and bookshelves. Warm indoor light. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A quiet room with warm indoor light. Two boys sit at a wooden chess table. One boy, about eleven, with dark curly hair and a green polo shirt, leans forward staring at the black and white chess board with intense concentration — one hand hovers over a knight piece, hesitating, his brow deeply furrowed in thought. The chess position is complex: pieces are scattered across the board in mid-game. His opponent, a boy in a red sweater, sits back in his chair with arms folded and a patient, slightly amused half-smile, waiting. A chess clock on the table shows time ticking. Bookshelves filled with books and a few chess trophies line the wall behind them. A round wall clock shows 3:30 PM.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place boy at the chess table, leaning forward and staring at the board, one hand hovering over a knight piece, brow deeply furrowed. Place opponent sitting back with arms folded and a patient half-smile.
